# Swords
# https://revenge-of-the-fallen-rotmg.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Swords&prop=wikitext

This page includes both custom swords and old swords that have been edited from how they appear on the predicting RotMG server.
{| class="article-table"
!Swords
!Damage
!Range
!RoF
!Shots
!Stats
!Pierce
!Armor Pierce
!Obstacle Pierce
!Fame Bonus
!Tier
!Legendary/Primal Effect
|-
|Sword of Splendor
|235-295
|4.3
|
|
|
|
|
|
|5%
|T13
|
|-
|Sword of Majest
|245-310
|4.3
|
|
|
|
|
|
|6%
|T14
|
|-
|Starbuster Blade
|255-320
|4.3
|
|
|
|
|
|
|6%
|GL
|
|-
|Sword of the Fallen
|275-340
|5.2
|90%
|
|<nowiki>+2att</nowiki>
+2dex
|
|
|
|6%
|Heroic
|
|-
|Blade of the Fallen Sky
|170-235
|5.3
|120%
|
|
|yes
|
|
|5%
|Heroic
|
|-
|Fang of Frost
|115-155
|4.5
|130%
|
|
|
|yes
|
|6%
|Unique
|
|-
|Sword of the Demon Lord
|220-260
|4.1
|80%
|
|<nowiki>+50hp</nowiki>
+5vit
|
|yes
|
|5%
|Unique
|
|-
|The Seaweed Sword
|75-145
|5
|120%
|3
|<nowiki>+4vit</nowiki>
|
|
|
|5%
|Artifact
|
|-
|Shadowbone Sword
|123-166
|4.8
|
|3
|<nowiki>+4att</nowiki>
+2vit
|yes
|
|
|5%
|Artifact
|
|-
|Dreadstump's Rapier
|140-175
|3.6
|175%
|
|
|
|
|
|0%
|Unique
|
|-
|Omega Ancient Sword
|180-240
|4.95
|
|3
|<nowiki>+2def</nowiki>
|
|
|
|6%
|Legendary
|Last Hope
|-
|Shattered War Axe
|200-300
|6.5
|75%
|
|
|
|
|
|6%
|Legendary
|Angel's Touch
|-
|Trowing Spear
|280
|9.75
|50%
|
|
|
|yes
|
|6%
|Legendary
|Angel's Touch
|-
|Enchanted Uru Sword
|180-240
|4.48
|75%
|2
|<nowiki>+4def</nowiki>
+6wis
|yes
|yes
|
|7%
|Legendary
|Angel's Touch
|-
|Gungnir 
|235-295
|7
|95%
|
|
|
|yes
|
|7%
|Legendary
|Throwback
|-
|Warbringer's Flagpole
|90-260
|3
|50%
|5
|<nowiki>+80hp</nowiki>
+8def

+8vit

-4dex
|
|
|yes
|6%
|Legendary
|Curse
|-
|Sword of Oryx
|345-420
|4.56
|120%
|
|
|yes
|yes
|
|7%
|Legendary
|Curse
|-
|Rotting Arm
|175-200
|2.9
|55%
|5
|<nowiki>+40hp</nowiki>
+4def
|
|
|
|6%
|Legendary
|Throwback
|-
|Ancient Stone Sword
|350-400
|5
|60%
|
|
|
|
|
|4%
|Legendary
|Throwback
|-
|Sword of the Collosus
|350-375
|5
|110%
|
|
|
|
|
|6%
|Legendary
|Throwback
|}
